title: Resolution Authorizing the Sangguniang Bayan Member and Acting Vice Mayor Honorable Miko C. Pelegrina to Sign All Transactions of the Office of the Vice Mayor Including All Disbursements, Checks and All Documents Pertaining to the Transactions of the Municipal Government with Land Bank of the Philippines (LBP). (AUTHOR : COUNCILOR GERONIMO A. CICERON, 09/27/2021)
